description: Apply via Butterbase manage_rls after schema apply. slack_workspaces and slack_tokens have no client SELECT policies (service functions only).

policies.note: Use subquery policy instead — slack_user_id is not auth id. Apply custom policy below.

policies.using_expression: slack_user_id IN (SELECT id FROM slack_users WHERE butterbase_auth_user_id = current_user_id()::uuid)
